bands.title: Keep Going!
messages: Practice makes perfect - keep at it! You'll get better every time you try.
Every mistake is a chance to learn! Give it another go and see how much you improve.
You're on your way! A little more practice and you'll be a superstar.

bands.title: Nice Try!
messages: Good job! Keep practicing and you'll score even higher next time!
You are getting the hang of it! Keep up the hard work and try again.
Nice try! Keep working at it, and you will master this in no time.

bands.title: Great Job!
messages: Well done! You are making great progress every time you play.
Great effort! You are really leveling up your skills.
Way to go! Keep up this great energy and watch your score grow.

bands.title: Awesome Work!
messages: Awesome job! You are doing incredibly well!
Fantastic work! You are so close to a perfect score!
Excellent work! Keep it up, you are doing amazingly well!

bands.title: You Are a Champion!
messages: Incredible! You are an absolute champion!
Wow, spectacular job! You completely nailed it!
Amazing! Your skills are truly outstanding today!
